string.name: what_s_new_toast
string.font:
- This version has been developed from scratch and is currently in its initial Alpha release. As such, it is highly unstable. 
 - As an Alpha release, please anticipate that some features may not function as expected. 
 - This initial release incorporates various core components of the application. 
 - Future versions will introduce additional features and stability improvements. 
 - This version is intended for testing purposes only. 
 - Introduced "MilkyGlass," an Apple-inspired liquid glass surface effect. 
 - Enjoy and happy testing

item.font:
We've enhanced the functionality of the app. 
 We're utilizing the new, advanced NowPlaying API for real-time updates regarding playback metadata state. 
 We've added a new Dynamic Widget that automatically adjusts to size. 
 More App Widget styles are coming soon.
